summary: A Go-based modular orchestration tool with plugin support, featuring schema validation, detection, assertion running, and reporting capabilities.
concerns: Automated session metadata commits cluttering git history
Uncommitted changes (3 modified, 6 untracked) indicating possible instability
Watch mode feature appears incomplete or heavily in flux based on repeated archival commits
suggestions: Add session metadata files to .gitignore to prevent auto-commit noise
Commit or stash the current working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
Stabilize the watch mode feature before merging to main
